title: Apparatus, methods and computer programs supporting event subscriptions
abstract: A first apparatus comprising at least one processor and at least one memory storing instructions that, when executed by the at least one processor, cause the first apparatus at least to perform: receiving a subscription or request from a second apparatus for one or more events; and determining if the reporting, to the second apparatus, of one or more events associated with the subscription is to be modified when at least one of the following: the first apparatus is in an energy saving mode; or the first apparatus is overloaded, wherein the determining is based on a reporting priority associated with the subscription.
claims:
Claims 1. A first apparatus comprising at least one processor and at least one memory storing instructions that, when executed by the at least one processor, cause the first apparatus at least to perform: receiving a subscription or request from a second apparatus for one or more events; and determining if the reporting, to the second apparatus, of one or more events associated with the subscription is to be modified when at least one of the following: the first apparatus is in an energy saving mode; or the first apparatus is overloaded, wherein the determining is based on a reporting priority associated with the subscription. 2. The first apparatus as claimed in claim 1, wherein the subscription received from the second apparatus comprises the reporting priority associated with the subscription which is to be used when at least one of the following: the first apparatus is in an energy saving mode; or the first apparatus is overloaded. 3. The first apparatus as claimed in claim 1, wherein the priority information comprises default priority information which is to be used when at least one of the following: the first apparatus is in an energy saving mode; or the first apparatus is overloaded. 4. The first apparatus as claimed in any preceding claim, wherein the determining comprises determining that the reporting of one or more events is to be muted. 5. The first apparatus as claimed in any preceding claim, wherein the determining comprises determining that the reporting of one or more events is to be less frequent. 6. The first apparatus as claimed in any preceding claim, wherein the determining comprises determining that the reporting of one or more events is dependent on a changed reporting threshold. 7. The first apparatus as claimed in any preceding claim, wherein the determining comprises determining that the reporting of one or more events is to be made with a changed sampling ratio. 8. The first apparatus as claimed in any preceding claim, wherein the subscription comprises one or more event reporting parameters for the reporting of one or more events associated with the subscription. 9. The first apparatus as claimed in claim 8, wherein the determining comprises determining that one or more of the event reporting parameters is to be changed based on the reporting priority associated with the subscription. 10. The first apparatus as claimed in claim 9, wherein in the first apparatus is caused to notify the second apparatus about one or more of the one or more changed event reporting parameters. 11. The first apparatus as claimed in claim 8, wherein the subscription comprises one or more event reporting parameters for the reporting of one or more events associated with the subscription when at least one of the following: the first apparatus is in an energy saving mode; or the first apparatus is overloaded. 12. The first apparatus as claimed in claim 11, wherein the one or more event reporting parameters for the reporting of one or more events associated with the subscription when the first apparatus is in an energy saving mode or the first apparatus is overloaded comprise one or more of a reporting threshold parameter; a granularity of dynamics parameter, a partitioning criteria parameter; a sampling ratio parameter, and an event reporting mode parameter. 13. The first apparatus as claimed in claim 11 or 12, wherein the determining is further based on the one or more event reporting parameters for the reporting of one or more events associated with the subscription or request when at least one of the following: the first apparatus is in an energy saving mode; or the first apparatus is overloaded. 14. The first apparatus as claimed in any preceding claim, wherein the determining uses an event reporting policy. 15. A second apparatus comprising at least one processor and at least one memory storing instructions that, when executed by the at least one processor, cause the second apparatus at least to perform: sending a subscription or request to a first apparatus for one or more events, said subscription or request comprising a reporting priority associated with the subscription or request which is to be used when at least one of the following: the first apparatus is in an energy saving mode; or the first apparatus is overloaded. 16. The second apparatus as claimed in claim 15, wherein the subscription or request comprises one or more event reporting parameters for the reporting of one or more events associated with the subscription or request. 17. The second apparatus as claimed in claim 16, wherein the second apparatus is caused to receive a notification from the first apparatus about one or more of the one or more changed event reporting parameters being used when at least one of the following: the first apparatus is in an energy saving mode; or the first apparatus is overloaded. 18. The second apparatus as claimed in claim 16, wherein the subscription or request comprises one or more event reporting parameters for the reporting of one or more events associated with the subscription or request when at least one of the following: the first apparatus is in an energy saving mode; or the first apparatus is overloaded. 19. A method comprising: receiving a subscription or request from a second apparatus for one or more events; and determining if the reporting, to the second apparatus, of one or more events associated with the subscription or request is to be modified when at least one of the following: a first apparatus is in an energy saving mode; or the first apparatus is overloaded, wherein the determining is based on a reporting priority associated with the subscription or request. 20. A method comprising: sending a subscription or request to a first apparatus for one or more events, said subscription or request comprising a reporting priority associated with the subscription or 

request which is to be used when at least one of the following: the first apparatus is in an energy saving mode; or the first apparatus is overloaded. 21. A computer program comprising computer executable code that when run on at least one processor causes the method of claim 19 or 20 to be performed.
